title: Meals Water Reservoir Maintenance 9/25 to 10/6
summary: In order to ensure clean, safe, and healthy water, the City of Cordova Water Department will be performing essential periodic maintenance on the Meals water reservoir from September 25 to October 6, 2023. title: DCCED Office of International Trade Awarded  $100,000 from SBA to Assist Small Business Exporters
summary: Wednesday, September 20, 2023 (ANCHORAGE, AK) – The State of Alaska Department of Commerce, Community, and Economic Development (DCCED), Office of International Trade has been awarded $100,000 from the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) through the State Trade Expansion Program (STEP).
